case_title: CHELSEA PACIFIC HOLDINGS LP. VS. 1787 UNION LLC ET AL

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT 1787 UNION LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHELSEA PACIFIC HOLDINGS LP. AS TO DEFENDANT 1787 UNION LLC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
